rationale: Educ. Code §37.147 governs prosecuting attorneys' complaint-filing rules in juvenile cases. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: An attorney representing the state in a court with jurisdiction may adopt rules pertaining to the filing of a complaint under this subchapter
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
